'''GandleMotors''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle manufacturing corporation based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kolatill]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The company also manufactured repulsor parts for [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]], a major repulsorlift manufacturer that had factory-complexes on the world.<ref name="O" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="MartialLaw">"[[Omens]]" states that martial law on [[Kolatill]] was "declared eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] ago". ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' to "eight years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]," for a date of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official, [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tetrum]], instituted martial law on the planet under the orders of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], ruler of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Under the terms of the martial law, all local repulsorlift manufacturing corporations were required to build combat [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeders]] for the Moff's [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]].<ref name="O" />

==Behind the scenes==
GandleMotors was mentioned in the [[roleplaying game]] adventure ''[[Omens]]'', which was published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="O" />
